name: vcp-s3-browser-app
description: AWS S3 Storage Browser plugin with TypeScript models, React UI library, and standalone app

scripts.ca:login: aws codeartifact login --tool npm --repository vcp-react-components --domain virtusasystems --domain-owner 787952688011 --region us-east-1
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run ca:login && pnpm run build:ts && cd typescript && pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/ && cd .. && pnpm run build:ui && cd s3-browser-plugin-ui && pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run ca:login && pnpm run build:ts && cd typescript && pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/ && cd .. && pnpm run build:ui && cd s3-browser-plugin-ui && pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
scripts.release:major: pnpm run ca:login && pnpm run build:ts && cd typescript && pnpm version major --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/ && cd .. && pnpm run build:ui && cd s3-browser-plugin-ui && pnpm version major --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
